title: becium grandiflorum var. metallorum
intro: Becium grandiflorum var. metallorum, also known as "Katembe" or "Metallorum", is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and related conditions. Its leaves have been traditionally used to reduce body temperature, alleviate headaches, and provide relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Becium grandiflorum var. metallorum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
